Item.title: Project bootstrappable via `uv sync`
Item.desc: pyproject.toml declares Python 3.11+ and pinned deps; `uv sync` produces uv.lock and a working venv.

Item.title: Settings load from .env via pydantic-settings
Item.desc: src/ai_steward_wiki/settings.py exposes Settings BaseSettings with frozen fields populated from .env / env vars.

Item.title: Structlog JSON-lines logger ready
Item.desc: logging_setup.configure_logging() outputs structlog JSON to stdout (journald-friendly) with mandatory fields ts, event, correlation_id, user_id, wiki_id, job_id.

Item.title: correlation_id contextvar
Item.desc: Public helper bind_correlation_id(value) sets a contextvar bound to every log line emitted within the async task.

Item.title: Lint/QA targets
Item.desc: Makefile exposes `make lint` (ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy --strict src/) and `make qa` (lint + pytest).

Item.title: Pre-commit config
Item.desc: .pre-commit-config.yaml runs ruff (check + format), mypy on staged src/, gitleaks. Hook installed via `pre-commit install`.

Item.title: Logger overhead negligible for hot-path (no per-line dict-merge cost beyond structlog defaults)
No secrets in repo — gitleaks pre-commit + .env gitignored

constraints.Item: Python 3.11+, uv only (no pip-tools, no Poetry)
All code/comments/commits in English; user-facing strings in Russian (later chunks)
structlog JSON output, not human-readable; rendering belongs to journald/Loki

Item.desc: Drift between pyproject pinned versions and uv.lock
Item.mitigation: uv.lock checked into git; CI/pre-commit verify lock consistency

Item.desc: Bd-installed pre-commit hook conflicts with project hook
Item.mitigation: Use the `pre-commit` framework so hook installation is idempotent; bd's existing hook is preserved by bd itself

scope_in.Item: .env.example with full settings list (skeleton — fields refined per chunk)

scope_out.Item: Any service modules (storage, scheduler, classifier, tg, …) — later chunks
CI workflow file (Makefile-only for MVP per spec §10.6)

deps.Item: aiogram==3.15 (deferred install; declare in pyproject for stability lock, used Chunk 10)

verification.Item: uv run python -c 'from ai_steward_wiki import __version__; print(__version__)' works
make lint passes (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy --strict src/)
bind_correlation_id('xyz') propagates through async tasks (asserted in test)
